meta.title: Open Tipper
meta.description: Score prediction with your mates — predict football match scores and compete on leaderboards.

home.heading: Open Tipper
home.description: Score prediction with your mates — predict football match scores and compete on leaderboards with friends, family, or co-workers.
home.featuresDescription: Set up a group, invite your mates, and start predicting. It's free and takes less than a minute.
home.featurePredictDesc: Enter your predicted score for every match — exact scores earn the most points.
home.featureGroupsDesc: Set up private groups for friends, family, or co-workers and compete head-to-head.
home.featureLeaderboardDesc: Track your ranking in real-time leaderboards updated automatically after each match day.
home.featureLeaguesDesc: Follow the Premier League, La Liga, Serie A, Liga MX, and more — all in one place.
home.featureScoringDesc: Earn 3 points for an exact score, 1 for the correct outcome. Strategy matters.
home.featureInvitesDesc: Share an invite link and friends can join your group in seconds — no app download needed.

signIn.heading: Open Tipper
signIn.providerNote: Only providers you've configured will work.

profile.heading: Profile
profile.readOnlyNote: Profile details are sourced from your OAuth provider and are read-only.

dashboard.heading: My Groups
dashboard.noGroups: You haven't joined any groups yet.
dashboard.emptyDescription: Create a group to start predicting scores with your friends.

howItWorks.heading: How It Works
howItWorks.description: Open Tipper is a free score-prediction game. Follow these six steps to start competing with friends.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Create a free account with Google, GitHub, or email. No app downloads, no credit card — just sign in and you're ready to go.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Start a private group and invite friends via a shareable link, or join an existing group someone sent you.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Each group follows a real football league — Premier League, La Liga, Serie A, Liga MX, and more are available.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Before each match day, enter your predicted home and away scores for every fixture. Lock in your predictions before kick-off.
howItWorks.step5Desc: After matches finish, scores are updated automatically. You earn 3 points for an exact score prediction, or 1 point for predicting the correct outcome (win/draw/loss).
howItWorks.step6Desc: Your group's leaderboard updates in real time. Track your ranking, see how your mates are doing, and compete across the full season.
howItWorks.scoringDesc: Points are awarded automatically after each match finishes.
howItWorks.ctaDescription: Sign up for free and start predicting today.

createGroup.heading: Create a Group
createGroup.description: Set up a prediction group for a football competition.
createGroup.noCompetitions: No competitions available — sync one in the Admin panel
createGroup.scoringRulesDesc: Customize how points are awarded. Defaults match the standard scoring system.

browse.heading: Browse Groups
browse.description: Discover public prediction groups and join the competition.
browse.noMatchFilters: No public groups match your filters.

predictions.noMatchesDesc: Matches will appear here once the contest schedule is synced.
predictions.failedToLoad: Failed to load matches. Please try again.

results.noResultsDesc: Results will appear here once matches have been played.
results.failedToLoad: Failed to load results. Please try again.

standings.noStandingsDesc: Standings will appear once matches have been played and scored.
standings.failedToLoad: Failed to load standings. Please try again.

invite.label: Invite link
invite.description: Share this link to invite people to your group.
invite.regenerateNote: Regenerating will invalidate the current link.
invite.shareText: Join my prediction group "{name}" and compete!

leaveGroup.confirm: Leave this group? You can rejoin later if the group is public or you have an invite link.

admin.heading: Admin
admin.description: Manage competitions, sync data, and administer users.
admin.searchPlaceholder: Search competitions by name, id, or region...

footer.description: Predict football scores, compete with friends, and climb the leaderboard. Free and open-source.
